reviews.text:
I had an excellent experience with Shashank, who handled my family’s tax filing with thorough due diligence and precision. He carefully applied the relevant sections in the ITR, ensuring accuracy and avoiding any potential discrepancies in the future.

Despite approaching him in the last week before the deadline, he efficiently managed to complete the filing on time, including complex capital gain computations. His up-to-date knowledge of tax laws and ability to clarify all our doubts gave us complete confidence in the process.

I highly recommend Shashank for his professionalism, expertise, and commitment. Thank you, Shashank, for your valuable support and timely assistance.

I had an excellent experience with Shashank, who handled my family’s tax filing with thorough due diligence and precision. He carefully applied the relevant sections in the ITR, ensuring accuracy and avoiding any potential discrepancies in the future.

Despite approaching him in the last week before the deadline, he efficiently managed to complete the filing on time, including complex capital gain computations. His up-to-date knowledge of tax laws and ability to clarify all our doubts gave us complete confidence in the process.

I highly recommend Shashank for his professionalism, expertise, and commitment. Thank you, Shashank, for your valuable support and timely assistance.

I approached Timone Consultancy to get my GST registration done for my cloud kitchen. I had been struggling with this for nearly two months, but the process was completed within a week.

I was treated with respect throughout. They have strong knowledge of their work, explained everything well, and provided polite and professional customer service. I look forward to continuing with them in the long run as my business grows.

Thank you again!
